mapper.select: select user.id, max(case when ui.identity = 1 then ui.identifier end) as username, user.password, user.avatar, user.nickname, user.birthday, user.gender, max(case when ui.identity = 2 then ui.identifier end) as phone, max(case when ui.identity = 3 then ui.identifier end) as email from user left join user_identity ui on user.id = ui.user_id where user.id = #{userId} group by user.id;
